speaker: Tanmay
text: Dekh Samay, aaj kal content ka biggest power kya hai pata hai? Distribution. Pehle TV decide karta tha kaun dikhega, ab koi bhi phone se content daal ke audience tak pahunch sakta hai.

speaker: Samay
text: Haan bhai sahi hai, main bhi chess khelte khelte stream kar raha tha corona me, aur log bol rahe the content strategy. Bhai mujhe khud nahi pata tha strategy hai.

speaker: Tanmay
text: Exactly. Internet me ek interesting cheez hoti hai, asymmetric luck. Tum ek video daalte ho, pata nahi kaun dekh lega. Kabhi kabhi ek random tweet ya video se pura career change ho jata hai.

speaker: Samay
text: Matlab basically tu video daal, aur pray kar ki algorithm bole isko famous bana dete hain?

speaker: Tanmay
text: Thoda sa woh bhi hai. Par real game consistency hai. Agar tum 100 videos banaoge tabhi ek viral niklega.

speaker: Samay
text: Haan ye sahi hai, log sochte hain ek reel se career ban jayega. Reality ye hai bhai 200 reel banao tab jaake ek chalti hai.

speaker: Tanmay
text: Aur long form content agar chal gaya na, woh real gold hai. Agar koi 20 minute tumhari video dekh raha hai, matlab usne tumhe apna time diya hai. Woh trust hai.
